name: trueai
title: TrueAI
description: Find the right AI SaaS app for any task using the TrueAI catalog (1,600+ curated apps with categories, sub-scores, pricing and real user reviews). Recommend by natural-language need, look up by name / slug / URL, browse by category, attach real user reviews.

tools.name: recommend_ai_tools
tools.description: Find AI tools that match a natural-language user need. Returns {intents, candidates, external}. ``candidates`` is already ranked by relevance & score; ``external`` lists fallback nav sites only when no in-catalog candidate matches.

description.description: The user's need in their own words. Be specific about scenario, audience, platform, language and budget. e.g. '我是新手想学编程，要免费的 AI 工具'.

top_k.description: Maximum number of candidates to return.

tools.name: get_ai_tool
tools.description: Resolve and return the full structured record of one AI app. Accepts numeric id, slug, display name, or official URL. Resolution order: numeric id → exact slug → official_url substring → brand keyword from URL → fuzzy name/tagline match.

name_or_url.description: The AI app's display name (e.g. 'Cursor', '通义千问'), its TrueAI slug, a numeric id, or its official URL (e.g. 'https://cursor.com').

include_reviews.description: If true, attach up to max_reviews real user reviews (sourced from watcha.cn) for social proof / usage tips.

tools.name: list_ai_tools
tools.description: Browse the catalog with structured filters and sorting. Returns {items, total, page, page_size}. Each item is a brief record; call get_ai_tool to drill into one.

category.description: Optional category slug, e.g. 'coding', 'image-gen', 'writing'. Use list_categories() to discover.

free_only.description: If true, only return tools with a free tier.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List every category in the TrueAI catalog. Each entry has slug, name, optional icon, sort_order, parent_id and tool_count. Use the returned slugs to filter list_ai_tools(category=...).
